violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Kitchen Sani Bucket found at ~150ppm Quat. *Made fresh bucket, +400ppm Quat. Use test strips to check solutions frequently. Sani dispenser in kitchen seems to be inconsistent.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. -Plates/dishes below microwave in kitchen were not covered or inverted.--Clean equipment/utensil was not placed in a self-draining position. -Ice buckets used for ice are not stored inverted and off of floor.--Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in the proper location to protect from contamination. -Ice scoops stored directly on top of ice machine uncovered.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Case of single use trays stored on floor in office. -Case of event cups stored on floor in backroom dry storage.--Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. -Single use plates in kitchen are not stored inverted.
General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -Employee did not wash hands before putting on gloves to package frozen foods. *Redirected immediately.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Sani Bucket found with less than 150ppm Quat solution. *Kitchen Quat dispenser does not appear to be working correctly. Sani bucket will need to made manually until fixed. With available Sani-T-10, 1 tsp per 2 quarts cool water made a 200-300ppm Quat solution. -Sani Spray bottles used at bar table tops found at greater than 400ppm Quat. *Should be maintained at 200-400ppm. Available quat tabs have instruction of 1 tablet per 1.5 gallon of water. NOT 1/2-1 tab per quart.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Heavy grease residue at sides of fryer.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Case of Paper towels and case of single use cups on floor in back room dry storage area.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Unfinished wall surface above electrical box in the kitchen area.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not maintained in good repair. -Some residue at floors around 2 door freezer where floor have warped and appear damaged.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Method, temperature and time (5 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
